globalSettings.title: Global Settings
globalSettings.description: Settings that affect the overall behavior of the drum.

allowDoubleInputs.heading: Allow Double Inputs
allowDoubleInputs.body: Enabling this option allows you to hit both pads harder and hit big notes. Using this functionality requires setting the heavy trigger setting in the pad thresholds.

padThresholds.title: Pad Thresholds
padThresholds.description: Configure the sensitivity and trigger levels for each pad.

lightTrigger.heading: Light Trigger
lightTrigger.body: How hard the pad must be hit to register a note. This is the most important setting to configure.

heavyTrigger.heading: Heavy Trigger
heavyTrigger.body: This field appears only after enabling "Allow Double Inputs" in Global Settings. This threshold is what decides if a hit to a pad bypasses the debounce and lets you hit a Big Note.

cutoff.heading: Cutoff
cutoff.warning: Verify you actually have this issue in the live monitor before setting this slider to a value lower than 4095.
cutoff.body: This setting is used in the situation where hitting a pad very hard causes a spike in another unrelated pad. In some boards we found out some current can leak into the analog input of another pin causing misreadings. This cutoff slider makes it so any hit that goes over this threshold is instantly ignored.

timingSettings.title: Timing Settings
timingSettings.description: Configure timing-related parameters for hit detection.

adcChannels.title: ADC Channel Mapping
adcChannels.description: Map physical ADC channels to drum pads.

keyMappings.title: Key Mappings
keyMappings.description: Configure which keys are sent when pads are hit.

bootScreen.title: Boot Screen
bootScreen.description: Customize the startup splash screen of your controller.

imageRequirements.heading: Image Requirements
imageRequirements.intro: The image will be converted to a 128x64 pixel 1-bit monochrome (black and white) bitmap.
imageRequirements.colorsItem: Colors: Will be dithered/thresholded to black and white

howToUse.heading: How to Use
howToUse.step3: 3. Click "Upload to Device" to flash the new image.
howToUse.step4: 4. The new splash screen will appear next time you plug in the device.

restoringDefault.heading: Restoring Default
restoringDefault.body: Click the trash icon to clear the custom image and restore the original ITAIKO logo.
